data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate anti-fraud constraints.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for anti-fraud constraints, specifically the maximum transfer count and lock windows. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms these constraints are implemented or functioning as intended. The prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to these specific anti-fraud measures, leading to an inconclusive result regarding their coverage.
gaps: No evidence of anti-fraud constraints (max transfer count, lock windows).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the anti-fraud constraints.
